features: This unique Double Strength whitening toothpaste combines state-of-the-art technology with an exclusive processing method to provide the ultimate whitening effect in a mouthwash base formula.
With regular use, this product whitens tooth enamel, eliminates yellowing and offers maximum oral hygiene.
As you brush, the built-in mouthwash disperses to hard to reach areas to help fight bacteria that cause bad breath.
Suitable for use with an electric toothbrush.
description: Product Description This unique Double Strength whitening toothpaste combines state-of-the-art technology with an exclusive processing method to provide the ultimate whitening effect in a mouthwash base formula. With regular use, this product whitens tooth enamel, eliminates yellowing and offers maximum oral hygiene. As you brush, the built-in mouthwash disperses to hard to reach areas to help fight bacteria that cause bad breath. Fluoride protection against cavities. Each pack comes with a free Anti-Stain whitening toothbrush and special Dental Flosser Toothpicks. Uses a Low Abrasion formula, and is safe for daily use Ingredients Calcium Carbonate, Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Sorbitol, Silica, Alcohol Denat., Aroma (Flavour), Sodium Lauryl Sulphate, Carboxymethyl Hydroxyethylcellulose, Chondrus Crispus (Carrageenan), CI 77891 (Titanium Dioxide), Sodium Saccharin, Rosa Canina Fruit Oil, Sodium Monofluorophosphate. Directions Use the toothpaste as your dentist recommends. Usually a pea-sized amount is applied to a soft toothbrush that brushes teeth in circular motions and at an angle of 45 degrees to the gum. Brush all tooth surfaces, including chewing surfaces, melting surfaces and gum lines. Brush for two minutes and then rinse thoroughly with water. Safety Warning Use only externally. Do not swallow. Keep away from children. Do not use and consult your dentist if irritation occurs. See more
